languages.text: "Что на тебя нашло? Зачем ты оскорбил гемункула?"
"What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
languages.original_text: "Что на тебя нашло? Зачем ты оскорбил гемункула?"

traits.locale_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
"What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
"What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
"What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
"What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"
"What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

languages.text: "Was ist in Euch gefahren? Warum beleidigt Ihr den Haemonculus?"
languages.original_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

traits.locale_text: "Was ist in Euch gefahren? Warum beleidigt Ihr den Haemonculus?"

languages.text: « Mais qu'est-ce qui vous a pris ? Pourquoi avoir insulté l'hémoncule ? »
languages.original_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

traits.locale_text: « Mais qu'est-ce qui vous a pris ? Pourquoi avoir insulté l'hémoncule ? »

languages.text: «¿Qué está haciendo? ¿Por qué insulta al Hemónculo?».
languages.original_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué está haciendo? ¿Por qué insulta al Hemónculo?».

languages.text: "Sana ne oldu böyle? Haimonkulus'a neden hakaret ettin?"
languages.original_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

traits.locale_text: "Sana ne oldu böyle? Haimonkulus'a neden hakaret ettin?"

languages.text: “你这是怎么了？为什么要辱骂血伶人？”
languages.original_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

traits.locale_text: “你这是怎么了？为什么要辱骂血伶人？”

languages.text: 「いったいどうしたんだ？ なぜハエモンクルスを侮辱したりする？」
languages.original_text: "What has gotten into you? Why would you insult the Haemonculus?"

traits.locale_text: 「いったいどうしたんだ？ なぜハエモンクルスを侮辱したりする？」
